roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: records concurrent system errors with INSERT OR IGNORE followed by an atomic counter increment, avoiding D1 UNIQUE constraint failures
applies the same concurrency-safe error recording in Core rollout tracking and Processor background jobs
renders gift plan volume, duration and price with Persian digits and Persian units in stable RTL order
removes the Latin GB token from gift plan buttons and recipient confirmation text
keeps Cloudflare upload receipt verification, service deletion, panel cache sync and all previous features

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; no manual D1 action is required
deployment.pasarguard_delete_permission: the connected panel administrator must have users.delete permission
deployment.verification_flow: Cloudflare PUT success receipt -> repeated runtime probe; Content API is diagnostic only
deployment.error_center_write: INSERT OR IGNORE row at zero -> atomic UPDATE increment

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
